attacking_style: Long-range solo attacks from 30km+ out, willing to commit fully to breakaways on challenging finishes including maximum gradient climbs.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team setup patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Maximum gradient finishes where explosive power matters more than sustained climbing; benefits from disorganized chase scenarios where peloton coordination is difficult.
vulnerability: Unable to determine specific vulnerabilities from limited observations, though solo efforts suggest potential weakness in direct sprint or organized chase situations.
key_patterns: Executes long-range solo attacks exceeding 30km, committed to high-risk breakaway efforts.
Thrives in accumulated fatigue conditions where peloton organization breaks down.
Strong finishing capacity on maximum gradient climbs after extended solo efforts.
form_trajectory: unknown: only single 2020 observation available, showing strong breakaway capacity but insufficient data for trend analysis
